caption: A man with a beard and short hair stands in a presentation setting, wearing a dark gold and black patterned button-down shirt. He is positioned in front of a plain white wall, with a large screen to his left showing a cropped image of people's legs and feet. In front of him is a white table holding a clear plastic water bottle and a glass. A black microphone is positioned in front of his chest. Across the top of the scene, the logo "mediasite by cornerstone" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing; he begins with his right arm extended and palm open, then brings his arm closer to his body while continuing to talk. His facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks, while the background and objects on the table remain stationary.
